narrative:
Cols 71-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 408 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.0 percentage points.
